/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsift_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsift_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/sift_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/sift_interfaces/msg/detail/image_features__description.c.o CMakeFiles/sift_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/sift_interfaces/msg/detail/image_features__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/sift_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/sift_interfaces/msg/detail/image_features__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
